TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sanek_nu_mukan, title = sanek_nu_mukan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sanek_nu_mukan} }

S.FORM: izay caay kalecan ku sanek nu mukan? sapuelac ngatu cacay i sema' nu mita, izaw ku sepat katukuh lima malebut a sipaw nu weilei . weilei taneng matineng ku sanek nu kakaenan ilabu' nu laway niyam, patapunu' ku cucuk nu sanek. tatenga', u tineng nu mita ku sanek, caay kayadah, u cilemin , sicedam , akenek , ahecid atu aledah , lima a sanek dada'. lima a sanek pasaupu sa, sayadah tu ku caay kalecaday a sanek. aninil sa , caay kalecaday a eneng nu sema', caay kalecad ku tineng. tinaku: i zicem nu sema' sa, kapah ku tieng nu sicedamay, i lamit nu sema, kapah ku tineng nu akenek. anu patiza tu waneng itiza i lamit nu sema', caay kakapah ku tineng, anu patiza tu waneng i zicem nu sema', sicedam ku tineng nu mita. ngatu tusa uzuma sa, u macucuk tu tademaway a kakaenan, tinaku: cupel, caykaw ku sanek kuyza, u cucuk kuyza. u tineng nu mita, aledah atu adada' a katinengan malecad tuway. u aesu' nu kakaenan, caay u sema' mitineng a cacay, malawilaw tu ku aazihen a tineng, sanek nu cihek, atekak-dawmi', u tiyung nu sema'. anu caay pisanek ku cihek mukan sa, u aesu' ku kakaenan, masumad tuway. u zuma sa, akuti'ay a kakaenan taneng matieng tu sicedamay, sisa, u dihku atu liedec malawilaw tu ku sanek nu sema'. ngatu tulu sanek nu mukan sa, u tieng nu namakay cucuk nu besucay huasei . lima a sanek, yamayiliu sicedam, ahecid, akenik, cilemin atu siyan . u zikuzay "siyan", capi a demaid maazih nu kagakay . sanek nu mukan sa, u icel nu tineng tu sanek nu tuud, yamayiliu kakaenan, kuangwu atu walak . u mauzipay izaw tu ku sanek-tineng ilabu' nu laway. namakayniyan a nasulitan nasakamuwan atu natinengan Wikipayke paybalucu'ay pulungamin a cudad-sanek nu mukan Researchers Define Molecular Basis of Human "Sweet Tooth" and Umami Taste Answers to several questions of curious kids about taste nasulitan nay paybalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1, nasulitan ni Tuku Sayun
S.PHON: izaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶an ku san…ôk nu mukan? sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ Ňčatu ¶a ¶aj i s…ôma Ē~ ° nu mita, izaw ku s…ôpat katukuńß r~…ĺima mar~…ĺ…ôbut a sipaw nu w…ôir~…ĺ…ôi . w…ôir~…ĺ…ôi tan…ôŇč matin…ôŇč ku san…ôk nu kaka…ônan ir~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺawaj nijam, patapunu Ē~ ° ku ¶u ¶uk nu san…ôk. tat…ôŇča Ē~ °, u tin…ôŇč nu mita ku san…ôk, ¶aaj kajadańß, u ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin , si ¶…ôdam , ak…ôn…ôk , ańß…ô ¶id atu ar~…ĺ…ôdańß , r~…ĺima a san…ôk dada Ē~ °. r~…ĺima a san…ôk pasaupu sa, sajadańß tu ku ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a san…ôk. aninir~…ĺ sa , ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a …ôn…ôŇč nu s…ôma Ē~ °, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tin…ôŇč. tinaku: i zi ¶…ôm nu s…ôma Ē~ ° sa, kapańß ku ti…ôŇč nu si ¶…ôdamaj, i r~…ĺamit nu s…ôma, kapańß ku tin…ôŇč nu ak…ôn…ôk. anu patiza tu wan…ôŇč itiza i r~…ĺamit nu s…ôma Ē~ °, ¶aaj kakapańß ku tin…ôŇč, anu patiza tu wan…ôŇč i zi ¶…ôm nu s…ôma Ē~ °, si ¶…ôdam ku tin…ôŇč nu mita. Ňčatu tusa uzuma sa, u ma ¶u ¶uk tu tad…ômawaj a kaka…ônan, tinaku: ¶up…ôr~…ĺ, ¶ajkaw ku san…ôk kujza, u ¶u ¶uk kujza. u tin…ôŇč nu mita, ar~…ĺ…ôdańß atu adada Ē~ ° a katin…ôŇčan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tuwaj. u a…ôsu Ē~ ° nu kaka…ônan, ¶aaj u s…ôma Ē~ ° mitin…ôŇč a ¶a ¶aj, mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu ku aazińß…ôn a tin…ôŇč, san…ôk nu ¶ińß…ôk, at…ôkak-dawmi Ē~ °, u tijuŇč nu s…ôma Ē~ °. anu ¶aaj pisan…ôk ku ¶ińß…ôk mukan sa, u a…ôsu Ē~ ° ku kaka…ônan, masumad tuwaj. u zuma sa, akuti Ē~ °aj a kaka…ônan tan…ôŇč mati…ôŇč tu si ¶…ôdamaj, sisa, u dińßku atu r~…ĺi…ôd…ô ¶ mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu ku san…ôk nu s…ôma Ē~ °. Ňčatu tur~…ĺu san…ôk nu mukan sa, u ti…ôŇč nu namakaj ¶u ¶uk nu b…ôsu ¶aj ńßuas…ôi . r~…ĺima a san…ôk, jamajir~…ĺiu si ¶…ôdam, ańß…ô ¶id, ak…ônik, ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin atu sijan . u zikuzaj "sijan", ¶api a d…ômaid maazińß nu kagakaj . san…ôk nu mukan sa, u i ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tin…ôŇč tu san…ôk nu tuud, jamajir~…ĺiu kaka…ônan, kuaŇčwu atu war~…ĺak . u mauzipaj izaw tu ku san…ôk-tin…ôŇč ir~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺawaj. namakajnijan a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuwan atu natin…ôŇčan wikipajk…ô pajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj pur~…ĺuŇčamin a ¶udad-san…ôk nu mukan *…ôs…ôar ¶ńß…ôrs d…ôfin…ô mor~…ĺ…ô ¶ur~…ĺar basis of ńßuman "sw…ô…ôt tootńß" and umami tast…ô answ…ôrs to s…ô*…ôrar~…ĺ *u…ôstions of ¶urious kids about tast…ô nasur~…ĺitan naj pajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu subana Ē~ °aj a pu ****-*, nasur~…ĺitan ni tuku sajun
S.FORM: izay caay kalecan ku sanek nu mukan? sapuelac ngatu cacay i sema' nu mita, izaw ku sepat katukuh lima malebut a sipaw nu weilei . weilei taneng matineng ku sanek nu kakaenan ilabu' nu laway niyam, patapunu' ku cucuk nu sanek. tatenga', u tineng nu mita ku sanek, caay kayadah, u cilemin , sicedam , akenek , ahecid atu aledah , lima a sanek dada'. lima a sanek pasaupu sa, sayadah tu ku caay kalecaday a sanek. aninil sa , caay kalecaday a eneng nu sema', caay kalecad ku tineng. tinaku: i zicem nu sema' sa, kapah ku tieng nu sicedamay, i lamit nu sema, kapah ku tineng nu akenek. anu patiza tu waneng itiza i lamit nu sema', caay kakapah ku tineng, anu patiza tu waneng i zicem nu sema', sicedam ku tineng nu mita. ngatu tusa uzuma sa, u macucuk tu tademaway a kakaenan, tinaku: cupel, caykaw ku sanek kuyza, u cucuk kuyza. u tineng nu mita, aledah atu adada' a katinengan malecad tuway. u aesu' nu kakaenan, caay u sema' mitineng a cacay, malawilaw tu ku aazihen a tineng, sanek nu cihek, atekak-dawmi', u tiyung nu sema'. anu caay pisanek ku cihek mukan sa, u aesu' ku kakaenan, masumad tuway. u zuma sa, akuti'ay a kakaenan taneng matieng tu sicedamay, sisa, u dihku atu liedec malawilaw tu ku sanek nu sema'. ngatu tulu sanek nu mukan sa, u tieng nu namakay cucuk nu besucay huasei . lima a sanek, yamayiliu sicedam, ahecid, akenik, cilemin atu siyan . u zikuzay "siyan", capi a demaid maazih nu kagakay . sanek nu mukan sa, u icel nu tineng tu sanek nu tuud, yamayiliu kakaenan, kuangwu atu walak . u mauzipay izaw tu ku sanek-tineng ilabu' nu laway. namakayniyan a nasulitan nasakamuwan atu natinengan Wikipayke paybalucu'ay pulungamin a cudad-sanek nu mukan Researchers Define Molecular Basis of Human "Sweet Tooth" and Umami Taste Answers to several questions of curious kids about taste nasulitan nay paybalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1, nasulitan ni Tuku Sayun
S.PHON: izaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶an ku san…ôk nu mukan? sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ Ňčatu ¶a ¶aj i s…ôma Ē~ ° nu mita, izaw ku s…ôpat katukuńß r~…ĺima mar~…ĺ…ôbut a sipaw nu w…ôir~…ĺ…ôi . w…ôir~…ĺ…ôi tan…ôŇč matin…ôŇč ku san…ôk nu kaka…ônan ir~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺawaj nijam, patapunu Ē~ ° ku ¶u ¶uk nu san…ôk. tat…ôŇča Ē~ °, u tin…ôŇč nu mita ku san…ôk, ¶aaj kajadańß, u ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin , si ¶…ôdam , ak…ôn…ôk , ańß…ô ¶id atu ar~…ĺ…ôdańß , r~…ĺima a san…ôk dada Ē~ °. r~…ĺima a san…ôk pasaupu sa, sajadańß tu ku ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a san…ôk. aninir~…ĺ sa , ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a …ôn…ôŇč nu s…ôma Ē~ °, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tin…ôŇč. tinaku: i zi ¶…ôm nu s…ôma Ē~ ° sa, kapańß ku ti…ôŇč nu si ¶…ôdamaj, i r~…ĺamit nu s…ôma, kapańß ku tin…ôŇč nu ak…ôn…ôk. anu patiza tu wan…ôŇč itiza i r~…ĺamit nu s…ôma Ē~ °, ¶aaj kakapańß ku tin…ôŇč, anu patiza tu wan…ôŇč i zi ¶…ôm nu s…ôma Ē~ °, si ¶…ôdam ku tin…ôŇč nu mita. Ňčatu tusa uzuma sa, u ma ¶u ¶uk tu tad…ômawaj a kaka…ônan, tinaku: ¶up…ôr~…ĺ, ¶ajkaw ku san…ôk kujza, u ¶u ¶uk kujza. u tin…ôŇč nu mita, ar~…ĺ…ôdańß atu adada Ē~ ° a katin…ôŇčan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tuwaj. u a…ôsu Ē~ ° nu kaka…ônan, ¶aaj u s…ôma Ē~ ° mitin…ôŇč a ¶a ¶aj, mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu ku aazińß…ôn a tin…ôŇč, san…ôk nu ¶ińß…ôk, at…ôkak-dawmi Ē~ °, u tijuŇč nu s…ôma Ē~ °. anu ¶aaj pisan…ôk ku ¶ińß…ôk mukan sa, u a…ôsu Ē~ ° ku kaka…ônan, masumad tuwaj. u zuma sa, akuti Ē~ °aj a kaka…ônan tan…ôŇč mati…ôŇč tu si ¶…ôdamaj, sisa, u dińßku atu r~…ĺi…ôd…ô ¶ mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu ku san…ôk nu s…ôma Ē~ °. Ňčatu tur~…ĺu san…ôk nu mukan sa, u ti…ôŇč nu namakaj ¶u ¶uk nu b…ôsu ¶aj ńßuas…ôi . r~…ĺima a san…ôk, jamajir~…ĺiu si ¶…ôdam, ańß…ô ¶id, ak…ônik, ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin atu sijan . u zikuzaj "sijan", ¶api a d…ômaid maazińß nu kagakaj . san…ôk nu mukan sa, u i ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tin…ôŇč tu san…ôk nu tuud, jamajir~…ĺiu kaka…ônan, kuaŇčwu atu war~…ĺak . u mauzipaj izaw tu ku san…ôk-tin…ôŇč ir~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺawaj. namakajnijan a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuwan atu natin…ôŇčan wikipajk…ô pajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj pur~…ĺuŇčamin a ¶udad-san…ôk nu mukan *…ôs…ôar ¶ńß…ôrs d…ôfin…ô mor~…ĺ…ô ¶ur~…ĺar basis of ńßuman "sw…ô…ôt tootńß" and umami tast…ô answ…ôrs to s…ô*…ôrar~…ĺ *u…ôstions of ¶urious kids about tast…ô nasur~…ĺitan naj pajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu subana Ē~ °aj a pu ****-*, nasur~…ĺitan ni tuku sajun
